---
title: "Ash (Fraxinus excelsior)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Fraxinus*](/trees/genus/fraxinus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 62 - Ash](../62.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 63 - Ash](../63.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 159 — Fraxinus](../159.html) |  |
